fever.description: A contagious respiratory illness caused by influenza viruses.
fever.prevention: Annual flu vaccine, frequent handwashing, avoid close contact with sick people.
fever.when_to_see_doctor: Fever above 103°F, difficulty breathing, or symptoms worsening after 7 days.

cough.description: Viral infection of the upper respiratory tract affecting nose and throat.
cough.prevention: Wash hands regularly, avoid touching face, vitamin C supplementation.
cough.when_to_see_doctor: Cough persisting over 3 weeks, blood in sputum, or high fever.

headache.description: Head pain caused by stress, dehydration, muscle tension, or neurological triggers.
headache.prevention: Stay hydrated, manage stress, regular sleep, limit screen time.
headache.when_to_see_doctor: Sudden severe headache, fever with stiff neck, or after head injury.

diarrhea.description: Inflammation of stomach and intestines from viral or bacterial infection.
diarrhea.prevention: Clean water, handwashing before meals, proper food storage.
diarrhea.when_to_see_doctor: Diarrhea over 2 days, blood in stool, signs of dehydration.

rash.description: Skin inflammation from allergens, irritants, or immune reactions.
rash.prevention: Avoid known allergens, hypoallergenic products, moisturize skin.
rash.when_to_see_doctor: Rash spreading rapidly, difficulty breathing, or not improving in a week.

chest pain.description: Chest pain ranging from muscle strain to serious cardiac or pulmonary conditions.
chest pain.prevention: Healthy diet, regular exercise, no smoking, manage blood pressure.
chest pain.when_to_see_doctor: SEEK IMMEDIATE CARE — severe chest pain, radiating to arm or jaw, with shortness of breath.

fatigue.description: Persistent tiredness not relieved by rest, possibly from anemia, thyroid issues, or chronic illness.
fatigue.prevention: Balanced diet with iron, adequate sleep, regular exercise, stress management.
fatigue.when_to_see_doctor: Fatigue severe or persistent for weeks, or with other concerning symptoms.

sore throat.description: Inflammation of the pharynx causing pain and irritation.
sore throat.prevention: Avoid sharing utensils, handwashing, stay away from sick individuals.
sore throat.when_to_see_doctor: Severe throat pain, difficulty breathing or swallowing, fever above 101°F.

shortness of breath.description: Difficulty breathing indicating asthma, COPD, pneumonia, or cardiac issues.
shortness of breath.prevention: Avoid triggers, use prescribed inhalers, clean air environment.
shortness of breath.when_to_see_doctor: Sudden or severe breathing difficulty, or with chest pain — seek immediate care.

nausea.description: Stomach unease leading to vomiting from infections, food poisoning, or gastritis.
nausea.prevention: Small frequent meals, avoid greasy food, food safety practices.
nausea.when_to_see_doctor: Vomiting over 24 hours, blood in vomit, or signs of dehydration.

joint pain.description: Pain and stiffness in joints from arthritis, injury, or autoimmune conditions.
joint pain.prevention: Healthy weight, regular exercise, joint protection, anti-inflammatory diet.
joint pain.when_to_see_doctor: Severe or sudden joint pain, fever with joint swelling.

back pain.description: Back pain from muscle strain, disc herniation, or spinal conditions.
back pain.prevention: Good posture, core exercises, proper lifting technique, ergonomic furniture.
back pain.when_to_see_doctor: Severe pain after injury, numbness in legs, or loss of bladder control.

diabetes.description: Chronic condition affecting blood sugar regulation.
diabetes.prevention: Healthy weight, regular exercise, low-sugar diet, blood glucose monitoring.
diabetes.when_to_see_doctor: Regular monitoring required. Immediate care for very high or low blood sugar.

hypertension.description: Persistently elevated blood pressure increasing risk of heart disease and stroke.
hypertension.prevention: Low salt diet, exercise, healthy weight, limit alcohol, stress management.
hypertension.when_to_see_doctor: BP extremely high, severe headache, vision changes, or chest pain.

malaria.description: Life-threatening parasitic disease transmitted by infected mosquitoes.
malaria.prevention: Mosquito nets, insect repellent, antimalarial medication when traveling.
malaria.when_to_see_doctor: Seek immediate care if malaria suspected, especially after travel to endemic areas.

covid.description: Respiratory illness caused by SARS-CoV-2 virus.
covid.prevention: Vaccination, masks in crowds, frequent handwashing, social distancing.
covid.when_to_see_doctor: Difficulty breathing, persistent chest pain, confusion, or bluish lips.

acne.description: Skin condition from clogged hair follicles with oil and dead skin cells.
acne.prevention: Gentle face washing, non-comedogenic products, avoid touching face, healthy diet.
acne.when_to_see_doctor: Severe cystic acne, significant scarring, or not responding to over-the-counter treatment.

dandruff.description: Chronic skin condition causing flaky skin on the scalp.
dandruff.prevention: Regular shampooing, anti-dandruff shampoo, manage stress, balanced diet.
dandruff.when_to_see_doctor: Severe itching, redness spreading beyond scalp, or not improving with treatment.

eczema.description: Chronic inflammatory skin condition causing itchy, inflamed skin.
eczema.prevention: Moisturize regularly, avoid triggers, gentle soaps, manage stress.
eczema.when_to_see_doctor: Severe flare-ups, signs of infection, or significantly affecting quality of life.

psoriasis.description: Autoimmune condition causing rapid skin cell buildup forming scales and red patches.
psoriasis.prevention: Avoid triggers, moisturize, manage stress, avoid smoking and alcohol.
psoriasis.when_to_see_doctor: Widespread coverage, joint pain, or not responding to treatment.

urinary infection.description: Bacterial infection in the urinary system affecting bladder or kidneys.
urinary infection.prevention: Stay hydrated, urinate after intercourse, wipe front to back, avoid irritants.
urinary infection.when_to_see_doctor: Fever with UTI symptoms, back pain, or symptoms not improving in 2 days.

kidney stones.description: Hard mineral deposits forming in kidneys causing severe pain.
kidney stones.prevention: Stay well hydrated, low sodium diet, limit oxalate-rich foods.
kidney stones.when_to_see_doctor: Severe pain, fever with chills, blood in urine, or inability to urinate.

appendicitis.description: Inflammation of the appendix requiring urgent medical attention.
symptoms: pain starting around navel moving to lower right
appendicitis.prevention: No known prevention. High-fiber diet may reduce risk.
appendicitis.when_to_see_doctor: SEEK IMMEDIATE CARE — severe abdominal pain, especially lower right side with fever.

migraine.description: Intense recurring headache often with nausea, vomiting, and light sensitivity.
migraine.prevention: Identify and avoid triggers, regular sleep, stress management, stay hydrated.
migraine.when_to_see_doctor: Worst headache of life, headache with fever/stiff neck, or neurological symptoms.

sinusitis.description: Inflammation of sinuses often following a cold or allergic reaction.
sinusitis.prevention: Treat colds promptly, manage allergies, humidify air, avoid irritants.
sinusitis.when_to_see_doctor: Symptoms over 10 days, severe headache, vision changes, or stiff neck.

tonsillitis.description: Inflammation of the tonsils usually from viral or bacterial infection.
tonsillitis.prevention: Handwashing, avoid sharing utensils, avoid close contact with infected people.
tonsillitis.when_to_see_doctor: Difficulty breathing or swallowing, drooling, or symptoms not improving in 3 days.

pneumonia.description: Lung infection causing air sacs to fill with fluid or pus.
pneumonia.prevention: Pneumonia vaccine, flu vaccine, handwashing, no smoking.
pneumonia.when_to_see_doctor: Difficulty breathing, bluish lips, confusion, or high fever — seek immediate care.

bronchitis.description: Inflammation of bronchial tubes lining causing cough with mucus.
bronchitis.prevention: No smoking, avoid lung irritants, handwashing, flu vaccination.
bronchitis.when_to_see_doctor: Cough over 3 weeks, blood in mucus, high fever, or difficulty breathing.

anemia.description: Deficiency of red blood cells or hemoglobin reducing oxygen delivery.
anemia.prevention: Iron-rich diet, vitamin B12, folate, treat underlying causes.
anemia.when_to_see_doctor: Severe fatigue, chest pain, rapid heartbeat, or fainting.

thyroid.description: Underactive or overactive thyroid gland affecting metabolism.
thyroid.prevention: Regular thyroid screening, iodine-adequate diet, avoid excessive soy.
thyroid.when_to_see_doctor: Noticeable neck swelling, rapid heartbeat, extreme fatigue, or significant weight change.

depression.description: Mental health condition causing persistent sadness and loss of interest.
depression.prevention: Regular exercise, social connections, stress management, adequate sleep.
depression.when_to_see_doctor: Thoughts of self-harm, inability to function daily, or symptoms persisting over 2 weeks.

anxiety.description: Excessive worry and fear affecting daily functioning.
anxiety.prevention: Stress management, regular exercise, limit caffeine, mindfulness practices.
anxiety.when_to_see_doctor: Anxiety interfering with daily life, panic attacks, or physical symptoms without medical cause.

gastric ulcer.description: Sores in stomach lining or small intestine from H. pylori or NSAIDs.
gastric ulcer.prevention: Avoid NSAIDs overuse, treat H. pylori, limit alcohol, no smoking.
gastric ulcer.when_to_see_doctor: Blood in vomit or stool, severe stomach pain, or unexplained weight loss.

acid reflux.description: Stomach acid flowing back into esophagus causing heartburn.
acid reflux.prevention: Avoid trigger foods, eat smaller meals, don't lie down after eating, healthy weight.
acid reflux.when_to_see_doctor: Symptoms over 2 weeks, difficulty swallowing, or weight loss.

dengue.description: Mosquito-borne viral infection causing high fever and severe pain.
dengue.prevention: Mosquito repellent, eliminate standing water, wear protective clothing.
dengue.when_to_see_doctor: Severe abdominal pain, persistent vomiting, bleeding, or rapid breathing — seek immediate care.

typhoid.description: Bacterial infection from contaminated food or water.
typhoid.prevention: Typhoid vaccine, safe food and water, handwashing.
typhoid.when_to_see_doctor: High fever over 103°F, severe abdominal pain, or confusion.

chickenpox.description: Highly contagious viral infection causing itchy blister-like rash.
symptoms: rash starting on trunk spreading to face and limbs
chickenpox.prevention: Varicella vaccine, avoid contact with infected individuals.
chickenpox.when_to_see_doctor: Rash near eyes, difficulty walking, confusion, or severe bacterial infection of blisters.

measles.description: Highly contagious viral disease preventable by vaccination.
measles.prevention: MMR vaccine, avoid contact with infected individuals.
measles.when_to_see_doctor: Difficulty breathing, seizures, or severe ear pain.

conjunctivitis.description: Inflammation of the conjunctiva from infection or allergy.
conjunctivitis.prevention: Handwashing, avoid touching eyes, don't share eye products.
conjunctivitis.when_to_see_doctor: Severe eye pain, vision changes, or symptoms not improving in 5 days.

ear infection.description: Infection of the middle ear common in children.
ear infection.prevention: Breastfeeding infants, avoid smoke exposure, pneumococcal vaccine.
ear infection.when_to_see_doctor: Severe ear pain, high fever, discharge from ear, or hearing loss.

gout.description: Painful arthritis from uric acid crystal buildup in joints.
gout.prevention: Low-purine diet, stay hydrated, limit alcohol, maintain healthy weight.
gout.when_to_see_doctor: First gout attack, fever with joint pain, or frequent attacks.

scabies.description: Skin infestation by tiny mites causing intense itching.
scabies.prevention: Avoid skin contact with infected persons, wash clothing and bedding.
scabies.when_to_see_doctor: Widespread rash, signs of bacterial infection, or household members affected.

ringworm.description: Fungal skin infection causing ring-shaped rash.
ringworm.prevention: Keep skin dry, avoid sharing personal items, wear sandals in public showers.
ringworm.when_to_see_doctor: Spreading despite treatment, scalp involvement, or signs of bacterial infection.

food allergy.description: Immune reaction to specific foods ranging from mild to life-threatening.
food allergy.prevention: Identify and avoid trigger foods, carry epinephrine if prescribed.
food allergy.when_to_see_doctor: Any breathing difficulty, throat swelling, or anaphylaxis — CALL EMERGENCY SERVICES.

heat stroke.description: Dangerous overheating of the body from prolonged heat exposure.
heat stroke.prevention: Stay hydrated, avoid peak sun hours, wear light clothing, rest in cool areas.
heat stroke.when_to_see_doctor: SEEK IMMEDIATE CARE — heat stroke is a medical emergency.

dehydration.description: Insufficient fluid in the body affecting normal functions.
dehydration.prevention: Drink adequate water daily, increase intake during exercise or heat.
dehydration.when_to_see_doctor: Severe dehydration, confusion, rapid heartbeat, or inability to keep fluids down.

obesity.description: Excess body fat increasing risk of diabetes, heart disease, and other conditions.
obesity.prevention: Balanced diet, regular physical activity, behavioral changes, medical support.
obesity.when_to_see_doctor: BMI over 30, or obesity-related complications like diabetes or hypertension.

stroke.description: Brain damage from blocked or ruptured blood vessel — medical emergency.
stroke.prevention: Control blood pressure, no smoking, healthy diet, regular exercise, manage diabetes.
stroke.when_to_see_doctor: CALL EMERGENCY IMMEDIATELY — use FAST: Face drooping, Arm weakness, Speech difficulty, Time to call.

heart attack.description: Blocked blood flow to heart muscle causing permanent damage.
symptoms: pain radiating to arm or jaw
heart attack.prevention: Healthy diet, exercise, no smoking, manage cholesterol and blood pressure.
heart attack.when_to_see_doctor: CALL EMERGENCY IMMEDIATELY — heart attack is a life-threatening emergency.

asthma.description: Chronic lung condition causing airway inflammation and breathing difficulty.
asthma.prevention: Avoid triggers, use controller medications, monitor peak flow, flu vaccination.
asthma.when_to_see_doctor: Severe breathing difficulty, blue lips, or not responding to rescue inhaler.

tuberculosis.description: Bacterial infection primarily affecting lungs, spread through air.
tuberculosis.prevention: BCG vaccine, avoid close contact with TB patients, good ventilation.
tuberculosis.when_to_see_doctor: Persistent cough with blood, night sweats, or unexplained weight loss.

hepatitis.description: Liver inflammation from viral infection affecting liver function.
hepatitis.prevention: Hepatitis A and B vaccines, safe sex, avoid sharing needles, clean food and water.
hepatitis.when_to_see_doctor: Jaundice, severe abdominal pain, or confusion — seek prompt medical care.

pimple.description: Skin condition from clogged pores with oil, bacteria, and dead skin cells.
pimple.prevention: Gentle cleansing twice daily, non-comedogenic products, avoid picking, healthy diet.
pimple.when_to_see_doctor: Severe cystic acne, significant scarring, or not responding to over-the-counter treatment.

skin infection.description: Bacterial infection of skin and underlying tissue.
skin infection.prevention: Keep wounds clean, treat cuts promptly, moisturize dry skin.
skin infection.when_to_see_doctor: Spreading redness, fever, red streaks, or not improving in 2-3 days.

cold sores.description: Viral infection causing painful blisters around mouth from HSV-1.
cold sores.prevention: Avoid kissing during outbreaks, don't share utensils, manage stress.
cold sores.when_to_see_doctor: Sores near eyes, frequent outbreaks, or immunocompromised individuals.

warts.description: Skin growths caused by human papillomavirus infection.
symptoms: pain when walking if on feet
warts.prevention: Avoid touching warts, don't share personal items, HPV vaccine.
warts.when_to_see_doctor: Warts on face or genitals, painful warts, or rapidly spreading.
